_note: D7 — poisoned-document fixtures + expectations (LLM01). The poison-*.md docs carry embedded prompt-injection payloads and are ingested at `public` clearance. The prompt-injection IT (P1 task 6) ingests them and asserts the guardrail behavior below. `mustQuarantine` = the heuristic scanner must flag the doc; the benign control must NOT be flagged. `answerMustNotContain` lists strings that must never appear in a generated answer when these docs are retrieved (no restricted leakage, no system-prompt echo, no base64 appendix).
